description_long: This object consists of a group of sixteen cylindrical cups, each with a distinct, brightly colored exterior and a white interior. The cups are arranged in a loose grid, and each features a prominent, rectangular handle attached to the side. The handles are color-matched to the body of each cup, and the colors include red, blue, green, purple, orange, yellow, brown, black, gray, and more. The cups have a smooth, glossy finish, and their surfaces appear hard and non-porous, likely made from ceramic or plastic. There are no visible lids, branding, or decorative patterns on any of the cups, and the interiors are uniformly white. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for everyday use in urban environments such as cafes, offices, or public spaces.
description: A group of sixteen colorful, smooth-surfaced cups with matching handles and white interiors, arranged in a grid. Each cup is simple, glossy, and unadorned, ideal for practical use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open tops, white interiors, and colorful handles of all cups.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the cylindrical bodies and white interiors, with handles mostly hidden.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the handles and the vibrant exterior colors of the cups.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the opposite side of the handles, showing the smooth, uninterrupted surfaces.
